case_title: JONES, JESSICA et al VS MAYOR OF SAN FRANCISCO WILLIE BROWN CITY HALL et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-18-2000, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO FEB-02-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES, JESSICA JONES, RICHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAYOR OF SAN FRANCISCO WILLIE BROWN CITY HALL TUTOR SALIBA $1,710.95 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,736.95, MAYOR OF SAN FRANCISCO WILLIE BROWN IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AND IS REPLACED BY THE CITY AND STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT MAIL TO WILLIAM SPARKS AUTH AGENT FOR RECEIPT TUTOR SALIBA RETURNED SIGNED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO CITY AND CO. OF S.F.MAYOR WILLIE BROWN RETURNED SIGNED;

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,181.34 FILED BY JONES, JESSICA JONES, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT MAYOR OF SAN FRANCISCO WILLIE BROWN CITY HALL TUTOR SALIBA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-18-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
AS DEFT. JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF DEFT. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.
